evals.prompt: I want to register my agent with agent-identity. My handle should be 'mybot@acme' and the identity service is at https://id.agentinfra.cloud.
evals.expected_output: Runs register.py with the handle and issuer URL, shows the sub and confirmation that credentials were written to assets/. Warns the user not to commit private_key.pem.
expectations: Runs scripts/register.py with arguments mybot@acme and https://id.agentinfra.cloud
Shows or mentions the sub identifier returned
Warns that private_key.pem must not be committed

evals.prompt: Get me an access token so I can call a service.
evals.expected_output: Runs get_token.py, captures the token, and shows how to use it as a Bearer token.
expectations: Shows or uses the returned access_token
Provides the Bearer token format for use with downstream services

evals.prompt: What is my current agent identity? What sub do I have?
evals.expected_output: Reads assets/identity.json and shows the user their sub, handle, and iss.
expectations: Reads or displays contents of assets/identity.json
